Class GameController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.client.GUI.GameController
All Implemented Interfaces:
GUIObserver
public class GameController extends Object implements GUIObserver
Lightweight JavaFX game controller used during the main game loop. Receives GUI observer callbacks and updates the on-screen phase/turn labels.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameController(javafx.stage.Stage stage, ServerRemoteInterface serverStub, ClientVirtualView clientHandler, PlayerDTO playerDTO)
    Creates the game controller and registers this observer with the client view.

    onActionAvailableChanged, onAskExtraDraw, onBoardInitialized, onBottomBuildRemoved, onCardAddedToTribe, onDefaultTileOrderChanged, onMarketInitialized, onPlayerAdded, onPlayerDisconnected, onPlayerReconnected, onRankReceived, onServerDead, onTopBuildingRefreshed, onTopBuildRemoved, onTopCardRefreshed, onWinners

  • Constructor Details

    • GameController

      public GameController(javafx.stage.Stage stage, ServerRemoteInterface serverStub, ClientVirtualView clientHandler, PlayerDTO playerDTO)
      Creates the game controller and registers this observer with the client view.
      Parameters:
      stage - the JavaFX stage on which the game screen will be displayed.
      serverStub - the remote server interface used to send actions.
      clientHandler - the local client view that receives notifications from the server.
      playerDTO - the DTO of the local player.

  • Method Details

    • showing

      public void showing()
      Builds and displays the main game scene on the primary stage. Should be called once after the controller is created.

    • onGamePhaseChanged

      public void onGamePhaseChanged(GAME_PHASE phase)
      Called when the game phase changes. Updates the phase label and appends a log entry.
      Specified by:
      onGamePhaseChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      phase - the new game phase.

    • onPlayerToPlaceChanged

      public void onPlayerToPlaceChanged(String n)
      Called when the active player changes during the placement phase.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerToPlaceChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      n - the nickname of the player who must now place their totem.

    • onPlayerToPlayChanged

      public void onPlayerToPlayChanged(String n)
      Called when the active player changes during the play phase.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerToPlayChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      n - the nickname of the player who must now take their action.

    • onEventResolved

      public void onEventResolved(int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
      Called when a game event is resolved. Appends a log entry.
      Specified by:
      onEventResolved in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      eventID - the unique ID of the resolved event.
      eventType - the type of the resolved event.

    • onPlayerPPChanged

      public void onPlayerPPChanged(String n, int p)
      Called when a player's Prestige Points change. Appends a log entry.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerPPChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      n - the player's nickname.
      p - the new Prestige Points value.

    • onPlayerFoodChanged

      public void onPlayerFoodChanged(String n, int f)
      Called when a player's food reserve changes. Appends a log entry.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerFoodChanged in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      n - the player's nickname.
      f - the new food reserve value.

    • onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile

      public void onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile(String n, int t, int fromSlot)
      Called when a player places their totem on an offer tile. Appends a log entry.
      Specified by:
      onPlayerPlacedOnOfferTile in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      n - the player's nickname.
      t - the position of the occupied offer tile.
      fromSlot - the originating slot on the default tile.

    • onTopCardRemoved

      public void onTopCardRemoved(int p)
      Called when a card is removed from the top row of the market. Appends a log entry.
      Specified by:
      onTopCardRemoved in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      p - the position of the removed card.

    • onBottomCardRemoved

      public void onBottomCardRemoved(int p)
      Called when a card is removed from the bottom row of the market. Appends a log entry.
      Specified by:
      onBottomCardRemoved in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      p - the position of the removed card.

    • onError

      public void onError(String m)
      Called when the server sends an error message. Appends a log entry.
      Specified by:
      onError in interface GUIObserver
      Parameters:
      m - the error text received from the server.
